---
name: New skill proposal · 新 Skill 提案
about: Propose adding a new skill to the repository · 提议向仓库新增一个 skill
title: "[Skill] "
labels: ["new skill", "enhancement"]
---

## Skill overview · 技能概述
<!-- One-sentence summary of what this skill does and when it should be triggered. -->
<!-- 一句话说明这个 skill 做什么、在什么时候被触发。 -->


## Problem / scenario · 问题或场景
<!-- What real situation does this skill solve? / 这个 skill 解决什么实际场景？ -->


## Proposed behavior · 预期行为
<!-- What should the agent do step by step? / Agent 应该按什么步骤执行？ -->


## Trigger conditions · 触发条件
<!-- When should the agent decide to use this skill? / Agent 在什么情况下应该调用它？ -->


## Inputs and outputs · 输入与输出

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Input · 输入 | |
| Output · 输出 | |

## Dependencies · 依赖
<!-- External tools, APIs, credentials, or other skills required. -->
<!-- 是否需要外部工具、API、凭证或其他 skill？ -->


## Proposed files · 计划文件
<!-- e.g. `my-skill/SKILL.md`, `my-skill/README.md`, optional scripts. -->
<!-- 例如：`my-skill/SKILL.md`、`my-skill/README.md`、可选脚本。 -->


## License · 许可证
<!-- Default is MIT. / 默认 MIT。 -->
